_comment: Single source of truth for the OpenCode MCP-config experiment. Edit models/configs/reps here.
//judge_model: Neutral grader, NOT one of the models under test (avoid self-eval bias). deepseek-v4-pro is strong and not in the matrix.
//timeout_seconds: Hard wall-clock cap per session; a hung/looping run is killed and recorded as errored rather than blocking the batch.
//pre_index: For the two memory MCPs, index the fixture before the timed task so query tools have data to return (single fresh session can't accumulate memory otherwise).
//run_verify: Execution-based scoring (tsc + hidden vitest + static checks) -> deterministic task_score (headline). Set false for a fast judge-only pass. Requires Node + the fixture's node_modules in the container.
